steps.title: Join verb to complement
steps.content: The sentence says the smoke point of corn oil "is around 450 degrees Fahrenheit." A linking verb should connect directly to its complement without punctuation.

steps.title: Reject unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a dash, Choice B a semicolon, and Choice D a comma between the verb and its complement. None of that punctuation belongs there. The remaining option leaves the verb and complement connected. The answer is C.
